_doc: Template for ~/.claude/settings.json. Merge the 'hooks' block into your existing settings (keep your theme, etc.). Path placeholders: <USER_HOME_POSIX> = MSYS-style (e.g. /c/Users/you on Windows; $HOME on mac/linux); <USER_HOME> = Windows-style (e.g. C:\Users\you). Keys starting with '_' below are documentation-only and MUST be renamed before saving: '_enabled_plugins_example' → 'enabledPlugins', '_extra_marketplaces_example' → 'extraKnownMarketplaces', '_other_settings_example' should be deleted and the inner fields hoisted to the top level. NOTE: only claude-agent-sdk-autopatch.ps1 runs on SessionStart below — claude-mem-autopatch.ps1 is intentionally NOT wired in here; run it manually after a claude-mem plugin update or via a scheduled task (see setup/07-memory-plugins.md).

hooks.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File '<USER_HOME_POSIX>/.lark-cli/daemon/notify-once.ps1' -AutoBot -Text '🔄 session 压缩完成（context reset），Feishu 长连接保持中' -Tag 'postcompact' -MinIntervalSec 30 >/dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
